title: Fermented-Crunchy Italian Pecans Traditional Lasagna
description: A comforting Sardinian-inspired dish featuring pecan nuts, smoky flavors, and a paleo-friendly twist on the classic lasagna. This recipe combines the richness of fermented pecans with the satisfying crunch of a traditional lasagna.

ingredients.name: Lentil Meatballs
ingredients.notes: made with green or brown lentils

instructions: Prepare the fermented pecan cheese by blending soaked pecans with 1 tablespoon water and 1 tablespoon lemon juice in a food processor until smooth.
In a large skillet, sauté the mushrooms, onion, and garlic in a little olive oil until softened.
In a separate pan, cook the lentil meatballs according to package instructions or make your own by cooking lentils, mixing with tomato paste, and forming into balls.
